## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows promising signs: impressions increasing, several keywords ranking in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Two articles staged for publishing tomorrow morning, including Lance's article](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Four new articles in progress, focusing on high-level, non-JTVD oriented topics](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Performance metrics now primarily drawn from Google Search Console for more relevant data](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Edits

  - [Lance's article to be published tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Two staged articles ready for publishing, pending category assignment](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Matt provided edits on previously tagged articles](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - ["Guide to Data Edition" needs category assignment, suggested "ETL modernization"](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Four new articles in progress, including "Guide to Slowly Changing Dimensions"](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Shifted to Google Search Console data for more relevant metrics](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Impressions increased (primary focus metric)](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Several keywords ranking in top 10 or close, especially for ETL modernization queries](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Data engineering skills blog and ELT blog moving towards top 10 rankings](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

  - [Expected timeline for significant results: end of 2nd month/beginning of 3rd month](https://fathom.video/share/5uddqMPwEiMAb4zs72Ra8f3wtoxEsQWS?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Traffic Sources
